settings.heading: Fix Your Posture. Sharpen Your Frame.
settings.subheading: The FrameFix Strap™ trains your body into proper alignment — improving your jawline appearance, height, confidence, and overall frame.

settings.heading: Your Posture Is Holding You Back
settings.bottom_text: The good news? This is fixable. And it starts with awareness.

settings.title: Forward Head Posture
settings.description: Pushes your jaw forward, compressing your jawline and making it appear less defined.

settings.title: Slouched Shoulders
settings.description: Makes you look shorter, less confident, and closed off. Weakens your upper back over time.

settings.title: Weak Frame
settings.description: Poor posture signals low energy and low confidence — before you even say a word.

settings.text: Adjustable fit — works for all body types

settings.heading: The Science Behind Posture
settings.subheading: Backed by peer-reviewed research, not bro-science.

settings.title: Jawline & Appearance
settings.description: Forward head posture compresses soft tissue under the chin, making the jawline appear less defined. Correcting alignment can visibly sharpen your profile.

settings.title: Height & Presence
settings.description: Slouching compresses the spine and reduces visible height. Proper alignment can make you appear noticeably taller.

settings.title: Confidence & Perception
settings.description: Upright posture is linked to higher confidence, better mood, and stronger first impressions.

settings.title: Breathing & Energy
settings.description: Poor posture reduces lung capacity and oxygen intake, causing fatigue.

settings.title: Pain Prevention
settings.description: Posture imbalances lead to neck pain, back pain, and chronic fatigue.

settings.title: Mood & Stress
settings.description: Upright posture is associated with lower stress and more energy.

settings.heading: Included Free: The Posture Mastery Course
settings.subheading: A complete 5-chapter course on how to fix your posture — delivered as a digital download with every purchase.
settings.emphasis_text: This isn't just a strap — it's a complete posture system.

settings.title: What Goes Wrong
settings.subtitle: Forward head posture, Upper Crossed Syndrome

settings.title: Put It On
settings.description: Wear the FrameFix Strap like a backpack. Adjust for a snug, comfortable fit.

settings.title: Build Awareness
settings.description: The strap gently pulls your shoulders back, teaching your body correct alignment.

settings.title: See Results
settings.description: Within weeks, your posture improves — your frame, jawline, and confidence follow.

settings.question: How long should I wear it per day?
settings.answer: Start with 15-30 minutes and gradually increase to 1-2 hours. The included course has a full 4-week plan.

settings.question: Will this actually improve my jawline?
settings.answer: Posture affects how your jawline appears by changing head and neck positioning. It won't change bone structure, but it can significantly sharpen how your features look.

settings.question: Can I wear it under clothing?
settings.answer: Yes. The FrameFix Strap is designed to be slim and discreet enough to wear under most shirts.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Many people notice a difference in how they carry themselves within the first week. Visible, lasting improvement typically takes 2-4 weeks of consistent use.

settings.question: What size should I get?
settings.answer: S fits chest 28-34 inches, M fits 34-38, L fits 38-42, XL fits 42-48. When in between sizes, go up.

settings.question: Is there a guarantee?
settings.answer: Yes. 30-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked.

settings.question: What's included with my order?
settings.answer: The FrameFix Strap™ and the full Posture Mastery Course (digital PDF download sent via email after purchase).

settings.heading: Your Frame Starts Here
settings.subheading: FrameFix Strap™ + Posture Course. Everything you need to stand taller, look sharper, and carry yourself with confidence.
